title: Fishing the Moon in the Well
content:
Fishing the Moon in the Well
 is a spell which manifests a well beneath the target and water, which reflects them.

It is used to pluck ones reflection into the material world. This can be used to kill someone, control them or trap them inside a false world in the image of the real world's reflection.
